name_cn:
【Top Quality Replica】Bestseller!
Drawstring Crossbody Bag🎉1BD250 Small/Vintage Bag🎉🎉
This new drawstring crossbody bag is made of imported nylon and calfskin. The strap, bottom, and body are all calfskin. The drawstring design at the opening looks very stylish and attractive. It is easy to carry with a large capacity, simple yet elegant, and a vintage bestseller that never goes out of style🎉🎉
L23 x H18 x W8cm
